sed -i -e 's/private int getBucketIndexForSkuString(String sku) { return Math.abs(sku.hashCode()) % capacity; }\s*private int getBucketIndexForSku(String sku) {/private int getBucketIndexForSku(String sku) {/' -e 's/Product dummy = ProductGenerator.generate(index);\s*return getBucketIndexForSkuString(sku);/return Math.abs(sku.hashCode()) % capacity;/' -e 's/int newIndex = Math.abs(entry.key.hashCode()) % newCapacity;/int newIndex = Math.abs(entry.value.hashCode()) % newCapacity;/' /app/src/Produ
